programmes.show_description: Back to the '90s as we hit you with the 50 greatest Eurodance anthems ever. Get your party started right here, right now!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!

programmes.show_name: Tulisa's Back to the Old Skool!
programmes.show_description: Yup! Already the 00s are Old Skool! Tulisa selects 25 classics from that first decade of this century, including N-Dubz, Tinchy, DJ Pied Piper and Eric Prydz.
Puppets, Bikinis, Singing Fish, Turtle Power, LEGO, Hamsters, Bart Simpson and putting a donk on it! This is 30 Silly Songs from the party master himself, Mr Pat Sharp.
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
An hour of the greatest party anthems ever. Happy times guaranteed! No room for moody people here!
A shell-shockingly eggcellent show full of 100 hard boiled hits, scrambled mixes and cracking tunes! Terrible puns aside, this show's no yolk.

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!

programmes.show_name: The Old Skool Night Of Your Life!
programmes.show_description: Join us for the old skool night of your life. Massive party tunes, huge old skool bangers and some epic euphoria. From 1990 to 2010.

Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Steph gives us her low down on every thing Eurodance. She's hand-picked 40 absolute bangers so expect: Haddaway, Jam & Spoon, Gala, Livin' Joy and a whole continent more!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
Thirty of the biggest beats of all time, from the 1990s to 2018 - and they've all sold a million! No single act appears twice in our chart, so expect a few surprises.

Join Nick Chicane for a deep dive into Balearic Beats. From day parties at Space to Cafe Del Mar sunsets and pulsing nights at Privilege revisit the tunes that defined an era.
